summary: A critical misclassification labels the KV_NAMESPACE_NOT_FOUND distractor as 'root_cause', directly contradicting the actual root cause (origin server TCP connection reset), which leaves a reader with a false diagnosis despite all relevant lines being present.
improvements: Reclassify KV_NAMESPACE_NOT_FOUND lines as 'distractor' or omit them from evidence — they pre-date the outage and are unrelated
Assign 'root_cause' to the upstream fetch failed 502/503 lines (upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers), not to the KV error
Note the escalating latency sequence (340ms -> 412ms -> 580ms -> 820ms) in a dedicated trigger chain to show the progressive origin degradation
